title: Making AA+ Medium for Synechococcus sp. PCC 7002
author: Anne Vogel
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.kg3ctyn

steps.instruction: Make 1000x FeCl 2 x6H 2 O Add 0.405g FeCl 2 x6H 2 O to 100mL MilliQ Filtersterilize. Do not autoclave!
Make 100x Tris 8.2 9.99g Tris in 100mL MilliQ Adjust pH to 8.2 with HCl Autoclave

Make 1000 x Trace mineral solution Use the following compounds: %s %s Compound Amount (g/L) H3BO3 2.86 MnCl2 x 4 H2O 1.81 ZnSO4 x 7 H2O 0.222 Na2MoO4 x 2 H2O 0.390 CuSO4 x 5 H2O 0.079 Co(NO3)2 x 6 H2O 0.0494 Autoclave or filtersterilize
Make 100x AA+ solution Use the following compounds, autoclave %s %s

Add compounds as described in table below to desired amount of miliQ. Add glycerol only when non-phototrophic growth is needed %s %s Compound 1L 500mL 250mL NaCl 18g 9g 4.5g MgSO4x7H2O 5g 2.5g 1.25g Glycerol 1.1mL 550μL 275uL If you want to make plates, add 15g/L agar agar Autoclave

Add compounds (table below) in the flow cabinet to the autoclaved and hand-warm solution Only add the B 12 if you are immediately using the medium. If some medium with B 12 is left after you used it, store it in a dark, cold place for a short time %s %s Compound 1L 500mL 250mL 100x Tris pH 8.2 10mL 5mL 2.5mL 1000x FeCl2x6H2O 1mL 500μL 250μL 1000x Trace mineral solution 1mL 500μL 250μL 100x AA+ solution 10mL 5mL 2.5mL vit B12 (1mg/mL) 4μL 2μL 1μL
